rationale: All required content is present and correct: 'THE PROBLEM' on a #14324F-style blue, 'THE SOLUTION' on the dark green, and a ~140px #FF5C39 bar that leads the wipe with slide B revealed cleanly behind it (no seams or flash frames). Composition is centered and balanced with bold white type and a tasteful accent underline. However, the sweep pacing is back-loaded: at ~1.8s (filmstrip tile 5) the bar is only ~18% across, then the entire wipe completes by the next tile, reading as a near-snap rather than the brief's ease-in-out that is fast through the middle. There is also a small stray orange dot artifact at frame 0 and at 50% (the underline at near-zero scale), and B's title is still mid-fade at 2.0s, so it needs one light timing/cleanup pass before shipping.
